C[Pander: I probably should have given you the corner and played for the edges
Pander: I don't think this ends well for me :\\
C[Pander: probably should have split that group.
C[Pander: crap what an annoyingly placed stone.
Pander: any hope of that corner gone :)
C[Pander: You're gonn ahave a big left and right side. I'll have a small middle and...that's about it. Good game but I think it's pretty set if you want me to resign rather tha play it out.
C[Pander: Are you securing the corner more? Or did you miss that extra liberty I had? Or am I missing something and gonna get wiped out?
C[tonberrytoby: No, I just wanted to secure my stuff in sente. Unless you make a mistake here.
C[tonberrytoby: I just noticed, I might have made a major mistake
Pander: luck you I am terrible at finding them!
Pander: The lack of two eyes?
tonberrytoby: my bottom group might not be 100% alive
Pander: again, not sure I can exploit it.
Pander: I'd probably try pokes and peeps, you'd build a framework, then hit like O2 to make two eyes
Pander: I also don't have S2
Pander: which is good for you.
Pander: you should have sente regardless...
tonberrytoby: yes. After you live on the top, I will play s2
Pander: I thought I need it
Pander: I thought AFTER you play H18
Pander: or else I keep going
Pander: I thought I was dead if I hit thew all too soon
Pander: I'm not reading this game too well, put all my effort into the games with mita va and lord silent
tonberrytoby: you are hanging on better than either of them. At least against me.
Pander: I think I have them on the ropes, so I guess that makes sense. All the games of go I've ever played in my life are in my history, so this is like game #20 or so fo rme.
tonberrytoby: didn't you use to play on kgs?
Pander: I might've signed up but I never really played because I didn't like the interface compared to this one
Pander: I might've tried a game or two, but the bulk of my experience was on here.
Pander: I think I just used that one to read the .sgf files
C[Pander: oh I was just going for the N5 group
Pander: I knew I couldn't kill the bottom
tonberrytoby: before I played s2 you could have
tonberrytoby: starting with the same move
Pander: I'd have descended instead of O5
Pander: then either monkey jump or just destroy the eyespace
Pander: although since I didn't have S2 I am still not sure I could have done it
Pander: so I just wanted a teensy tiny victory by killing your N5 and M7 stones
Pander: I was one move away from that :(
tonberrytoby: keeping sente seems to be your weakness
C[Pander: a lot of things are my weakness :)
C[tonberrytoby: you were pretty good at direction of play. You should be sdk on kgs already, I think.
C[Pander: aw thanks. I kinda don't think so cause uranus just got to be a sdk on kgs and he hands me my lunch money every time, but it's cool to hear!
C[tonberrytoby: My game against uranus is pretty close.
Pander: I think this is one less point.
tonberrytoby: And I think it would not have been sente.
Pander: I was wondering when you'd hit that after you got sente
C[Pander: I think pretty much everything else is 1 point splits...
C[tonberrytoby: there are some 2 point gote moves left
tonberrytoby: and I jsut noticed a 3 point move...
C[tonberrytoby: I don't see what you are trying to do here.
Pander: put your H15 stones in atari maybe, and maybe your entire D16 group in atari if you didn't connect right.
tonberrytoby: It doesn't really work because you can't play g16
Pander: I'd need you to not notice it :)
Pander: if you hit G19 I'd do H18 then I need a tenuki or H19
Pander: but it might have filled in some of my stones below your line and generated some forcing moves
Pander: I dunno. Just seemed like a neat idea :)
C[tonberrytoby: It would have worked if you had played k15 earlier
C[Pander: oh forgot abotu the ko
